summary: VenuLoQ $50M Hero Section Visual Upgrade - All 11 features tested and verified. Desktop and mobile viewports both display correctly with enhanced hero image visibility, social proof on mobile, gold gradient CTA with glow, and frosted glass venue carousel overlays.

landing_page_desktop.details: Landing page loads correctly on 1920x1080 with vivid hero image visible (opacity 0.45)

landing_page_mobile.details: Landing page loads correctly on 390x844 with hero image, headline, and search card visible

hero_headline.details: 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' visible with gold accent (#D4B36A) on both viewports, text-shadow applied

social_proof_mobile.details: 'Trusted by 1,800+ events' and '500+ verified venues' NOW VISIBLE on mobile (previously hidden)

sub_description_mobile.details: Sub-description 'Tell us your event...' visible on mobile

search_card_toggle.details: City/Near Me toggle functional on search card

city_dropdown_z_index.details: City dropdown opens with z-index:100, correctly above venue carousel

find_venue_cta.details: CTA button works, navigates to /venues/search, has cta-gold-gradient class with glow animation

venue_carousel_frosted_glass.details: Venue cards show frosted glass overlay (backdrop-blur-md) with venue name + city in white text

venue_carousel_larger_cards.details: Card sizes verified: 180px mobile, 220px tablet, 260px desktop

admin_login.details: Admin login works with admin@venuloq.in / admin123 - redirects to /admin/dashboard

navigation_links.details: Discover, Weddings, Corporate links all navigate correctly to search page

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 visual improvements verified in code:
2. Lighter gradient overlay: from-[#0B0B0D]/50 via-transparent to-[#0B0B0D]/95 (line 571)
4. Social proof visible on mobile: no 'hidden sm:block' class (lines 586-590)
5. CTA gold gradient with glow: cta-gold-gradient class with @keyframes cta-glow animation (lines 492-505)
6. Venue carousel: larger cards w-[180px]/w-[220px]/w-[260px], frosted glass overlay with backdrop-blur-md (lines 255, 261-264)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLoQ $50M hero section upgrade complete. All visual improvements verified: brighter hero (0.45 opacity), lighter gradient, text-shadow on headline, social proof visible on mobile, gold CTA with glow, larger venue carousel cards (180/220/260px) with frosted glass overlays. Mocked API: Razorpay payments (test mode).
